headline: Assessing TE Connectivity (TEL) Valuation After Credo Settlement Clears Legal Overhang
summary: TE Connectivity (TEL) stock is back in focus after the company and Credo Technology reached a confidential licensing and settlement agreement over Active Electrical Cable technology, clearing all related lawsuits between the two. See our latest analysis for TE Connectivity. The settlement and recent earnings and dividend news come after a softer share price patch, with a 90 day share price return of 10.36% and year to date share price return of 10.36%. headline: TE Connectivity PLC (NYSE:TEL) Presents a Compelling Case for Dividend Investors
summary: TE Connectivity (TEL) offers a reliable dividend with a history of growth, backed by strong profitability and a solid balance sheet for sustainable income.
